AJAMAMODIFIERS-ADVANCED_SCROLL_BOXES.des: Upon pickup, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] packs of cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
AJAMAMODIFIERS-ADVANCED_WINGED_BOOTS.des:
You may ignore paths when choosing the next rooms to travel to [blue]{Rooms}[/blue] times.
At the start of each Act, gain another [blue]{ExtraRoomsPerAct}[/blue] usages.
AJAMAMODIFIERS-ADVANCED_WINGED_BOOTS.fla: Things are always better in blue. Or rainbow.
